name: Smono 3 Vaporizer
summary: One of the smallest convection vaporisers around, for patients who want discretion at a low price.
description: The Smono 3 is a very compact closed-convection device that punches above its size, delivering clean vapour through a stainless steel chamber and glass mouthpiece. It handles both herbs and concentrates, with an included oil/wax chamber and adjustable temperature, heating in around 35 seconds. At roughly 8cm it's genuinely pocket-sized and discreet. It suits a patient who prioritises portability and a low price without giving up convection flavour. The plastic body keeps it light and cheap, which is the trade-off for the size and cost.
